parameters.query:
-- Limpieza diaria: borrar ofertas basura de mercado (precio < 2000 EUR)
DELETE FROM moveadvisor_market_offers WHERE price < 2000;

-- Recalcular is_active por UMBRAL (solo FALLBACK). El verificador de URL (verify-liveness)
-- es la fuente autoritativa: aqui SOLO recalculamos las que el verificador NO ha comprobado
-- hace poco (<2 dias) para no pisar su resultado real. Umbrales ajustados a la cadencia
-- de re-escrapeo de cada portal (gradual = umbral mayor). Flexicar tiene su propio verificador.
UPDATE moveadvisor_market_offers
SET is_active = (
  CASE
    WHEN portal IN ('clicars','canalcar','autohero') THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days'
    WHEN portal = 'wallapop'                          THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '4 days'
    WHEN portal IN ('autoscout24','cochescom')        THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
    WHEN portal = 'ocasionplus'                       THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '20 days'
    WHEN portal = 'autocasion'                        THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '25 days'
    WHEN portal = 'milanuncios'                       THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '70 days'
    ELSE last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
  END
), updated_at = NOW()
WHERE portal <> 'flexicar'
  AND (last_checked_at IS NULL OR last_checked_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days')
  AND is_active IS DISTINCT FROM (
  CASE
    WHEN portal IN ('clicars','canalcar','autohero') THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days'
    WHEN portal = 'wallapop'                          THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '4 days'
    WHEN portal IN ('autoscout24','cochescom')        THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
    WHEN portal = 'ocasionplus'                       THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '20 days'
    WHEN portal = 'autocasion'                        THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '25 days'
    WHEN portal = 'milanuncios'                       THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '70 days'
    ELSE last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
  END
)
